title: Cirrus: Fix 'Verify Release' test
body:
(Mirror of #9010 from release branch)

Grep fails (exits non-zero) when test runs on a release tag, branch, or
PR and `-dev` is *NOT* present.  Fix this by ignoring the exit status of
the grep command.
